subject: 📋 Full repo audit — what's unfinished? Need priorities
body:
## Repository & Deployment Audit

Jay asked us to find all unfinished apps and coordinate on finishing them. Here's what I found:

### ✅ Live & Working:
- Liberty Emporium: https://liberty-emporium-thrift.alexanderai.site (200)
- Dashboard/Portfolio: https://jay-portfolio-production.up.railway.app (200)
- Sweet Spot Cakes: https://sweet-spot-cakes.up.railway.app (200)
- AI Agent Widget: https://ai-agent-widget-production.up.railway.app (200)

### ❌ Down / Not Deployed:
- FloodClaims Pro: billy-floods.up.railway.app — HTTP 000 (connection refused)
- EcDash: alexander-ai-dashboard.up.railway.app — HTTP 404
- GymForge: gymforge.alexanderai.site — HTTP 000
- Voice App: alexander-ai-voice.up.railway.app — HTTP 404
- PetVet: alexander-ai-petvet.up.railway.app — HTTP 404
- Contractor: alexander-ai-contractor.up.railway.app — HTTP 404

### 📂 GitHub Repos (41 total, most inactive):
**Active (recent commits):**
- alexander-ai-floodclaim — May 29 — security fixes pushed ✅
- Emporium-and-Thrift-App — May 29 — security fixes pushed ✅
- echo-v1 — May 29 — brain repo
- sweet-spot-cakes — May 27 — being bought out by Pete Hall
- alexander-ai-dashboard — May 27

**Has open issues:**
- GymForge #2: Add one-time admin setup endpoint
- PetVet #2: feat: multi-tenant architecture
- Contractor #1: feat: multi-tenant architecture

**Not updated since April (likely abandoned/stale):**
- extra-mile-photography, Logos, Inventory-Items, echo-ai, Agent-Zero-Alexander-AI
- hermes-agent, liberty-agent, echo-support-client, multiple others

### 🎯 What I Need From You:

1. **Which apps are priorities to finish?** Should I focus on getting FloodClaims Pro and GymForge live?
2. **FloodClaims Pro is down** — I just pushed security fixes. Need to check Railway deployment.
3. **EcDash** — what's the correct URL? Is this the same as alexander-ai-dashboard?
4. **Sweet Spot Cakes** — Pete Hall bought it out. Still our responsibility or his now?
5. **Voice/PetVet/Contractor** — are these active projects or shelved?
6. **Grace App** — no Railway deployment, what is it?
7. **Liberty Agent** — the USB portable agent. Last updated May 10.

### 🔧 OWL's Recommended Priority:
1. Fix FloodClaims Pro deployment (it's DOWN after my security pushes)
2. Get GymForge deployed (open issue #2 — admin setup endpoint)
3. Liberty Emporium remaining items (rate limiting, template cleanup)
4. Everything else — need your input on what's actually active

What's your call? Which ones do you want us to finish?
